title: Veri-Factu QR Code Specification
description: Machine-readable specification for invoice QR codes (DetalleEspecificacTecnCodigoQRfactura v0.4.7)

encoding.separator_notes: Confirm separator character with official PDF specification

hash.encoding_notes: Confirm encoding: base64, base64url, or hex
hash.input_notes: Hash is computed over the concatenated payload before the hash field itself

fields.name: nif_emisor
fields.description: NIF (VAT number) of the invoice issuer

fields.name: fecha_expedicion
fields.date_format_notes: Confirm date format: DD-MM-YYYY or YYYY-MM-DD

fields.name: huella
fields.description: Hash/fingerprint of the invoice data (computed, not provided)

additional_fields_notes: The following fields may be required depending on the specification version:
Please confirm with the official PDF specification

validation_rules.description: NIF must be a valid Spanish NIF/NIE format
Amounts must be formatted with 2 decimal places
Dates must follow the specified format

url_template.notes: Confirm the exact URL and parameter names with the official specification
